questions.question: Define pendant vertex and null graph. Provide an example of each to illustrate your definition.
questions.hint: Explain the properties of both concepts.

questions.question: Let G be a simple graph with order 5 and null graph of G denoted by N(G). Find the order of G and N(G).
questions.hint: Use the properties of null graphs to solve this problem.

questions.question: Suppose a graph G is a null graph. Prove that G contains no pendant vertices. Explain your answer using a diagram.
questions.hint: Use the properties of null graphs and graphical representation.
